subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, my Goal, the ultimate object of my hopes and my Refuge! I fear none but Thee, I place my trust in none but Thee, and I turn in trepidation to none save Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ربى و مقصودى و منتهى املى و موئلى لا افزع الا الیک و لا اتوکل الا علیک و لا اجزع
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
